healed.what: Staging heavy executor re-shipped from the Mac lane after the machine's own key rotation killed both cloud Railway secrets
healed.live_identity: healthz ok=true, source_sha=08fecd6f7b044f3840338a9dba4bc22106e0d83a, config_digest=583a300f… (exact match to what today's candidates required)
healed.authorization: Founder's live Railway CLI session on the Mac; founder unlocked the session's deploy permission in-app; no tokens created, read, or moved

pipeline_self_heal.behavior: Deploy workflow now probes the live engine first and reuses it with zero credentials when the exact heavy config digest already matches; CLI upload only when heavy source truly changed. Next natural machine run goes green; cockpit announces Fixed automatically.

remaining_true_state: Cloud Railway secrets are still dead — future heavy-SOURCE changes will fail deploy until the secret-sync lane (which broke them) writes valid ones. Typed follow-up belongs to that lane, not the founder, unless Railway proves dashboard-only.
